Centre for Trade Excellence

Resilient foundations for a secure future

Acting knowledgeably and building a safer world through responsible international best practices and norms.

Explore Focus Areas Get Involved

ANNOUNCEMENTS

insights
The Trade-Technology Nexus and Economic Security in Asia-Pacific
Expert reflections on trade, technology and economic security challenges shaping the region.
SEE INSIGHTS
Introducing The Diplomat Series
A New Forum for Honest Dialogue and Collective Action
The Diplomat Series is our response to that need: a forum for honest dialogue and collective action.
LEARN MORE
Thriving through turbulence:
TE co-hosted the Global Trade Congress 2025
Join global leaders shaping future-ready trade frameworks amid complexity, disruption, norms.
LEARN MORE
SEE OUR MILESTONES

VIDEO hIGHLIGHTS

How does the Centre for Trade Excellence empower global collaboration to make trade a force for good?
Watch our explainer video to find out
LEARN MORE ABOUT TE
Hosted our first reception celebrating Women in International Trade and UNSCR 1325
Watch the highlights from 11 Sep 2024
JOIN TE

Latest Causes

Areas of focus

The Centre for Trade Excellence (TE) is a global non-profit organization that builds internal capacity, strengthens partnerships amongst stakeholders, and promotes awareness of compliance requirements and standards in export controls and global trade.
COMPTENCY FRAMEWORK
Strategic Trade Controls & International Security
Trade at the Frontline of Global Security
Risk Management
& Compliance
Navigating Complexity with Confidence
Cybersecurity &
Business Integrity
Securing the Digital Backbone of Global Trade
Leadership Development
& Governance
Building Trade Leadership for a Complex World
Sustainable
Trade
Redesigning Trade for a Sustainable Future
Stakeholder Engagement & Negotiation
Collaboration as a Strategic Asset

our leaders

TE is spearheaded by veterans in their fields who are driven by a passion to achieve excellence. Together with an experienced team of subject matter experts, they have come together to make this vision a reality.
MEET THE TEAM

Latest Causes

“Be a global citizen. Act with passion and compassion. Help us make this world safer … for the generations that will follow us. That is our moral responsibility.”
UN Secretary-General Ban-Ki Moon
